title: Checkout returns 500 for all users after 14:00 deploy
body: Every payment attempt fails with HTTP 500 since the 14:00 deploy. No workaround. Customers cannot pay.

title: Dashboard takes 12s to load for accounts with >10k orders
body: Large accounts report the orders dashboard hangs ~12s. Smaller accounts are fine. Likely an N+1 query.

title: Login fails with 401 right after password reset
body: After resetting a password, the first login attempt returns 401; a second attempt works. Token not refreshed?

title: Export CSV drops the last row for odd-numbered result sets
body: When the result count is odd, the exported CSV is missing the final row. Data integrity issue on reports.

title: Typo: 'Recieve notifications' in settings page
body: The settings toggle label reads 'Recieve notifications' — should be 'Receive'.
